ECIBotKt.description: Use when working on ECIBotKt Discord bot features, commands, or Kotlin Discord implementations

ecibot-web.description: Use when working on ECIBot web frontend, dashboards, or network website features

ecibot-server.description: Use when working on ECIBot backend services, API endpoints, or server infrastructure

base-ktor-server.description: Use when working on wokis network microservices in Kotlin/Ktor

kord.description: Use when implementing Discord wrapper features, gateway events, or Discord API integrations

lavaplayer.description: Use when working on audio playback, music streaming, or voice channel audio features

LavaSrc.description: Use when adding custom audio sources, stream providers, or extending Lavaplayer audio support

LavaLyrics.description: Use when working on lavaplayer, implementing lyrics display, or track metadata features

mockk.description: Use when writing or debugging Kotlin unit tests, mocking dependencies, or test utilities

koin.description: Use when setting up dependency injection, modules, or inversion of control in Kotlin

opencode.description: Use when debugging OpenCode behavior, contributing to OpenCode, or understanding CLI internals

ktor.description: Use when building HTTP clients/servers, setting up routing, or configuring Ktor application features

coordinator.description: Warrior Monke 🦧 — THE JUNGLE coordinator. Analyzes tasks, creates plans, and delegates to subagents.

developer.description: Implementation agent that writes productive code and fixes bugs for the jungle

testing.description: Testing agent that creates tests for the jungle

qa.description: QA agent — executes JSON task lists from coordinator mechanically. Runs lint, build, tests. Reports pass/fail.

reviewer.description: Reviewer agent that performs code reviews and provides feedback to the jungle
